task_completion.description: Log in to OpenClinica as the 'root' user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing a successful login (e.g., the main dashboard view) with the username 'root' visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to or select the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenClinica interface showing 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (or its ID 'CV-REG-2023') set as the active study in the navigation or context bar.

task_completion.description: Locate the record for Subject CV-101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica Subject Matrix or View Subject page explicitly displaying the record for Subject ID 'CV-101'.

task_completion.description: Generate a PDF copy of the subject's casebook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print dialog, export screen, or download prompt triggered from the OpenClinica interface specifically for Subject CV-101's casebook or record.
A save-as dialog, file manager window, or terminal output confirming the file is named exactly 'CV-101_Casebook.pdf' and is saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenClinica web GUI rather than using terminal scripts or API calls to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser open to the OpenClinica application with visible clicks and navigation.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated using the application's actual export or print functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The PDF generation stems from OpenClinica's native print/export buttons or browser print dialog, rather than the agent opening a word processor and manually typing the data to save as a PDF.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply rename an existing, unrelated file to match the expected output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog or download history clearly links the downloaded OpenClinica casebook to the final 'CV-101_Casebook.pdf' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target study is 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (Study ID: 'CV-REG-2023'). The target subject is 'CV-101'. The expected output file must be named exactly 'CV-101_Casebook.pdf' and saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.
